taskTitle: Read a foundational aqidah text (e.g., Al-Aqidah al-Tahawiyyah)
subtaskTitle: Read the section on the attributes of Allah
csQueryPrompt: For a MILOS subtask titled 'Read the section on the attributes of Allah' under the parent task 'Read a foundational aqidah text (e.g., Al-Aqidah al-Tahawiyyah)' (module: faith_shahada_growth), propose exactly 2 NotebookLM queries to a Quran/Hadith primary-source corpus: (1) Quran-biased — name likely primary ayat that directly or contextually anchor this subtask; (2) Hadith-biased — name likely Sahih hadith (Bukhari/Muslim preferred) that directly or contextually anchor this subtask. Return the queries inside a <queries></queries> block as a numbered list, each one sentence, ready to paste into a retrieval system. Do NOT answer the queries — query formulation only.
extractedQueries: What are the primary ayat, such as Surah Ash-Shura 42:11 which establishes that "there is nothing like unto Him" and Surah Al-Ikhlas 112:1-4, that directly anchor the scriptural framework for studying the attributes of Allah?

Which authentic narrations, particularly those in Sahih al-Bukhari and Sahih Muslim detailing the 99 Names of Allah or His specific divine actions and attributes, contextually anchor the theological study of His nature in classical aqidah texts?
